## marp-slide

## Verification Checklist

- [ ] Environment and dependencies are properly configured
- [ ] Marp Slide output was generated successfully
- [ ] Output meets expected quality and style requirements
- [ ] Any errors during execution were resolved
- [ ] Final result is saved or delivered as expected

## Description

Create professional Marp presentation slides with 7 themes (default, minimal, colorful, dark, gradient, tech, business). Includes expert theme selection, anti-patterns, and image integration.

## When to Use

- Creating presentations or slide decks
- Building pitch decks
- Making "look good" slides
- Creating Marp documents
- Professional presentations
- Technical talks or demos

## When NOT to Use

- Simple text documents
- Real-time collaborative editing
- Non-presentation content
- Video or animation-heavy content

## Workflow

### Phase 1: Plan Presentation

- Define topic and audience
- Outline key points
- Gather content and images
- Choose theme

### Phase 2: Create Slides

- Set up Marp document
- Add title and content slides
- Insert images and diagrams
- Apply theme and styling

### Phase 3: Design & Polish

- Ensure consistent formatting
- Optimize for readability
- Add transitions if needed
- Review slide flow

### Phase 4: Present & Export

- Export to PDF or HTML
- Test presentation
- Deliver to audience

## Tools & References

- **Related Skills**: frontend-design, mermaid-diagrams
- **Marp**: https://marp.app
- **Themes**: 7 built-in themes available
- **Markdown**: Marp uses Markdown syntax

## Best Practices

- Use consistent theme throughout
- Limit text per slide
- Use high-quality images
- Maintain visual hierarchy
- Test on presentation equipment
- Practice presentation flow
- Export to multiple formats
